calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioner: Charanita Rose Williams, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony by the Petitioner, the Petition is DENIED without prejudice.
Petitioner to file an Amended Petition with the proper name.
